project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Rigged up onto HBA-06. RIH with 4.65" Gauge Cutter and hung up @89ft so have been hand-jarring since. Reached ~700ft and currently in hole with the 4.5" I-broach. Injecting the Well every 50ft. Latest lookahed for MFC Sunday Evening. LL cc with JC today.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: JC arrived in Esbjerg 10:30am checkin tomorrow

project: PRJ03262 - SLB - SLB Denmark - DFA16 (MFA-16)_DFA18 (MFA-18)_DFB11 (MFB-11)_DFB21 (MFB-21) - MFC
comment: Total have called for the Dan kit to mob back out to DFB16 for a continuation of the original work-scope - Leaking GLV remediation. Equipment will mob Thursday, 21st and and Engineer 22nd. Engineer still to be assigned.

project: PRJ03313 - Welltec - Welltec - Kazakhstan - T-4848_T-108_TBC - MFC
comment: Welltec Cutter Stuck in Amsterdam, so mobilisation is delayed. Curretly unknown Mob date, may mob on 17th. from Aksai.

project: PRJ03261 - SLB - SLB Denmark - HBA21 (HBA-21)_HBA11 (HBA-11) - MFC
comment: Maintenance complete and Main/backup tools prepped and ready. Building scaffold and pressure testing slickline PCE today. Latest lookahead has MFC logging on Friday evening, but this could come forward.
